PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P641 wd:Q13295 ; wdt:P1347 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2013)
}
GROUP BY ?player
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
